name: Zurflüh-Feller
message: Zurflüh-Feller is a leading French manufacturer of components forroller shutters, specializing in systems and solutions for building closures since 1920. The company is committed to optimizing logistics and providing technical partnerships, ensuring timely delivery and tailored support for its clients.We will upload 66gb of corporate data soon. Employee documents (passport, identification cards), detailed financials, confidentialfiles, contracts and agreements, NDAs, etc.
